sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, text String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse'), (2, 'ClickHouse Testing'), (3, 'Fuzzing Examples');
SELECT id, ngramMinHashUTF8(text, 3, 6) AS hashes FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET text = 'ClickHouse Fuzzing' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT ngramMinHashUTF8(text, 2, 4) AS hashes FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
